calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Answers To Post Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-25-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances on THU-JUL-25-2013:
THANG N. NGUYEN, defendant / opposing party appears in Propria Persona;
No appearance by or on behalf of the plaintiff.

Defendant THANG N. NGUYEN appears this day without notifying the moving party of his appearance. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.'S Motion to Compel Answers to Post Judgment Discovery is GRANTED. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $390. No opposition was filed. The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling. Judge Pro Tem: Thomas A. Cohen; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
